legs.name: create_outcome_request
legs.detail: Buyer escrows the full max price (300 wCOSMO) with workload URI, input hash, deadline and review window.

legs.name: submit_quote
legs.detail: Provider quote (200 wCOSMO) flows through the signed quote path — the guarded-phase quality gate.

legs.name: accept_quote
legs.detail: Buyer accepts; the 100 wCOSMO residual is refunded exactly and job 0 becomes ACTIVE.

legs.name: deliver_result
legs.detail: Bonded provider delivers against the result hash of the deterministic workload.

legs.name: approve_delivery
legs.detail: Buyer approves; settlement path 0 pays the provider 200 wCOSMO. Escrow empty, bond untouched.
